versions.label: Steampunk NASA Rocket - detailed geometry

notes.text: [DECISION] Built a steampunk NASA-style rocket with 13 labeled components: mainBody, noseCone, upperStage, interstage, upperNose, engineBells x2, engineFairing, fins, rings, pipes, rivets, portholes. Color scheme: aged steel body, brass nose cones, copper pipes/bells, polished brass rings, dark bronze fins/interstage, cast iron fairing, blue glass portholes.
